title: Napoleon
content:
"What is the world, O soldiers?
 It is I:
 I, this incessant snow,
    This northern sky;
 Soldiers, this solitude
    Through which we go
        Is I."
meaning:
"Napoleon" is a quintessential example of Walter De La Mare's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
